title: Section 36
content: (1) The Mayor or the Deputy Mayor shall hold office from the time of his election until the election of his successor in office, unless in the meantime he resigns his office as Mayor or Deputy Mayor 1*** or unless in the case of the Deputy Mayor he is elected as Mayor. (2) The Mayor or the Deputy Mayor may be given such facilities in respect of residential accommodation, conveyance and the like as may be determined in each case by rules made in this behalf. (3) The Mayor shall have full access to all the records of 2[3[the Corporation]] and may obtain reports-- 4*** from the Commissioner on any matter connected with the municipal government of 5[6]Delhi]]; 7* * * * *
footnote: 1. The words "or his term of office as a member of the Corporation terminates in any manner" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, s. 33 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 2. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for "the Corporation" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 3. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for "a Corporation" (w.e.f. 22-5-2022). 4. The brackets and letter (a) omitted by Act 67 of 1993, s. 33 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 5. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 3, for “Delhi” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 6. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “the area of the Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022) 7. Omitted by Act 67 of 1993, s. 33 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).
